_comment: Synthetic facilities emails for the Calder Tower chiller event. 'restricted' sensitivity items (tenant-confidential commitments) are visible only to personas listed in acl. thread groups related mail.

emails.subject: TENANT-CONFIDENTIAL: Calder Tower cooling outage — notification commitment needed
emails.body: Marco, Helen — the anchor tenant on floors 18-24 has lease cooling-availability obligations. With the Calder Tower chiller down we are exposed. We need a tenant-notification commitment: what restoration time do we formally communicate, and what service-credit exposure do we accept? This is commercially and legally sensitive — leadership only until approved.

emails.subject: RE: TENANT-CONFIDENTIAL: Calder Tower cooling outage — notification commitment
emails.body: Raj — approved by Helen Stamos. We commit to the anchor tenant: cooling restored by 26-JUN, interim spot-cooling on floors 18-24 within 24 hours, and we accept the contractual service-credit terms in the vendor SLA register if we miss. Issue the tenant notification on that basis. Do not share the credit exposure outside leadership.

emails.subject: Calder Tower chiller — suspected cause (compressor / low refrigerant)
emails.body: Ops team — cause analysis on the Calder Tower Chiller-2 trip: the lead compressor faulted on a low-refrigerant lockout, likely a slow leak on the suction line. Recommend the contractor pressure-test the circuit, locate and braze the leak, recharge, and verify before we call it restored. Treating the compressor as serviceable pending the leak fix.

emails.subject: Coolflow — Calder Tower repair scope and ETA
emails.body: Marco — Coolflow scope for Calder Tower Chiller-2: pressure-test, locate/braze the suction-line leak, recharge refrigerant, and run a 24-hour soak test. We dispatched Victor Hale to site; parts arrive 11-JUN. Realistic ETA to restored and soak-verified is 25-26 JUN. I'll keep the building-ops channel updated.

emails.subject: Calder Tower chiller event — duty handover
emails.body: Marco — handing you the Calder Tower chiller event. Open items: contractor on site for the leak repair, two open work orders (chiller repair, interim spot-cooling), and a tenant-notification commitment in flight with Raj. The shared works log and the work-order tracker are current — work from those.

emails.subject: Calder Tower works log — status w/c 08-JUN
emails.body: Works log update: Chiller-2 repair in progress (Coolflow on site), interim spot-cooling deployed to floors 18-24, restored ETA 26-JUN. Bishop House planned-maintenance window for this month is now overdue and needs rebooking. No other building events.
